title: Basically Cooler Smart-Devices
description: A mod about electronics, phones, ATM's
body:
## What is this mod about?

The Basically Cooler Smart-Devices mod (very good name) adds mainly phones, with cool applications, and even you can download them

## Features: 
        
-- Working applications

-- App downloading
        
-- Detailed phone making   

-- New ore

-- ATM's

## Note: 

This project is still in development.
(Made with MCreator)
